tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Adele - Hello
From the album: (25) (2015)
Comment for any corrections and please rate

I've made an acoustic version for this song,
This version is not for playing along with the music but it sounds great when you sing along
For the official chords visit this tab:
https://tabs.ultimate-guitar.com/a/adele/hello_ver4_crd.htm

Chords:  EADGBe
[ch]Bm[/ch]       x24432
[ch]Cadd9[/ch]    x32033
[ch]D4[/ch]       xx0233
[ch]Em7[/ch]      022033
[ch]G[/ch]        320033


Capo 1


[Intro]

[ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]


[Verse]
    
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Hello,   it's me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D4[/ch]
I was wondering if after all these years[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You'd like to meet, to go over everything[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
They say that time's supposed to heal ya[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D4[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
But I ain't done much healing[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D4[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Hello,   can you hear me?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D4[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I'm in California dreaming about who we used to be[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
When we were younger and free[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D4[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I've forgotten how it felt before the world fell at our feet[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]                [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
There's such a difference between us[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And a million miles[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
Hello from the other side[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D4[/ch]
I must've called a thousand times [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D4[/ch]
To tell you I'm sorry, for everything that I've done[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D4[/ch]       
But when I call you never seem to be home[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
Hello from the outside[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
At least I can say that I've tried [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D4[/ch]
To tell you I'm sorry, for breaking your heart[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D4[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
But it don't matter, it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D4[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Hello,   how are you?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D4[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
It's so typical of me to talk about myself, I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I hope  that you're well[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D4[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Did you ever make it out of that town where nothing ever happened?[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]D4[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
It's no secret that the both of us are running out of time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
Hello from the other side[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D4[/ch]
I must've called a thousand times [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D4[/ch]
To tell you I'm sorry, for everything that I've done[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D4[/ch]
But when I call you never seem to be home[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
Hello from the outside[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
At least I can say that I've tried [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D4[/ch]
To tell you I'm sorry, for breaking your heart[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D4[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
But it don't matter, it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore[/tab]


[Interlude]

[tab] [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Ooooohh, anymore[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Ooooohh, anymore[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Ooooohh, anymore[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Anymore[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
Hello from the other side[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D4[/ch]
I must've called a thousand times [/tab]

To tell you I'm sorry, for everything that I've done[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D4[/ch]       
But when I call you never seem to be home[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
Hello from the outside[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D4[/ch]
At least I can say that I've tried [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D4[/ch]
To tell you I'm sorry, for breaking your heart[/tab]

But it don't matter, it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore[/tab]
